name: Tangy Buttermilk Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the bread ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bakery bowl in the following order: yeast, buttermilk powder, flour, salt, sugar, and shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Set the baking control to "white bread" setting.
4. Push Start to begin the baking process.
This recipe yields a tangy, tender bread. For the best flavor, use extra-sharp Cheddar cheese.
